description: District Basketball — 4 x 8 min quarters

tieBreaker.rules: 1 overtime period of 5 min. Repeat until winner.

description: International Basketball — 4 x 12 min (NBA) or 10 min (FIBA), instant replay

tieBreaker.rules: 5 min overtime periods with instant replay. Unlimited until result.

description: National Basketball — 4 x 10 min, FIBA rules

tieBreaker.rules: 5 min overtime. Unlimited OT periods until result.

description: State Basketball — 4 x 10 min quarters

tieBreaker.rules: 5 min overtime periods until winner decided.

description: District Carrom — Best of 3 boards, 25 pts

tieBreaker.rules: One extra board. Higher points wins.

description: International Carrom — Best of 5, ICF championship rules

tieBreaker.rules: ICF championship tiebreak: extra board with time limit.

description: National Carrom — Best of 5 boards

tieBreaker.rules: One extra board. If still tied, coin toss for first strike.

description: State Carrom — Best of 3 boards, ICF rules

tieBreaker.rules: One extra board with ICF tiebreak procedure.

description: District Chess — Rapid 15+10, single game

tieBreaker.rules: Blitz tiebreak: 5 min vs 4 min. Black gets draw odds.

description: International Chess — FIDE Classical 90+30+increment, DGT boards

tieBreaker.rules: FIDE tiebreak protocol: 4 rapid (25+10), then 2 blitz (5+3), then armageddon.

description: National Chess — Classical 90+30, FIDE rated

tieBreaker.rules: Two rapid games (15+10). If tied, two blitz (5+3). If still tied, armageddon.

description: State Chess — Rapid 15+10, arbiter required

tieBreaker.rules: Two rapid games (10+5). If tied, armageddon.

description: District Cricket — 15 overs, 2 innings, basic rules

tieBreaker.rules: 1 super over per side, 6 balls each. Higher runs wins. Repeat if tied.

description: International Cricket — ICC T20 rules, full DRS, Snickometer

tieBreaker.rules: ICC super over rules. If tied again, repeated super overs until result.

description: National Cricket — T20 (20 overs), DRS available

tieBreaker.rules: 1 super over per side. If still tied, repeated super over.

description: State Cricket — T20 (20 overs), DRS not available

tieBreaker.rules: 1 super over per side. If still tied, boundary count-back.

District Football — 2 halves x 30 min, no extra time

tieBreaker.rules: Straight to penalty shootout (5 kicks per side)

description: International Football — FIFA standard, VAR, 2 x 45 min

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 15 min extra time with VAR. If still tied, penalty shootout (5 kicks, then sudden death).

description: National Football — 2 x 45 min, extra time + penalties

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 15 min extra time. If still tied, penalty shootout (5 kicks, then sudden death).

description: State Football — 2 halves x 40 min, penalty shootout

tieBreaker.rules: 5 penalties per side. Sudden death if tied after 5.

description: District Hockey — 2 x 25 min halves

tieBreaker.rules: Penalty shootout (5 one-on-one penalty strokes)

description: International Hockey — FIH standard, video referral

tieBreaker.rules: FIH shootout: 5 x 8-second one-on-one. Video referral available. Sudden death if tied.

description: National Hockey — 4 x 15 min quarters (FIH format)

tieBreaker.rules: Penalty shootout (5 strokes, 8-second one-on-one). Sudden death if tied.

description: State Hockey — 2 x 30 min halves

tieBreaker.rules: Penalty shootout (5 strokes). Sudden death after 5.

description: District Kabaddi — 2 x 15 min halves

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 5 min extra time halves. If still tied, golden raid (sudden death).

description: International Kabaddi — IKF/PKL rules, video review

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 7 min extra time with video review. Golden raid if still tied.

description: National Kabaddi — 2 x 20 min, full officiating

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 7 min extra time. If still tied, golden raid with toss advantage.

description: State Kabaddi — 2 x 20 min halves, PKL format

tieBreaker.rules: 2 x 5 min extra time. If tied, golden raid.
